name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-2
title: No test asserts build-contract.json registers the SKILL.md copy-file target
description: Invariant 6 states skills are managed via explicit copy-file entries in build-contract.json. test-skill-decoupled.py tests the built SKILL.md matches the source but does not assert that the build-contract.json entry exists. If the entry is accidentally removed, the skill stops being deployed but no test fails. Add a test that reads build-contract.json and asserts the rabbit-spec SKILL.md copy-file target is present.
